item.title: “So we go to a little dive bar after work all the time …
item.description: While at last weekend’s celebrity golf tournament at Lake Tahoe, Charles Barkley sat down for a podcast interview with Pardon My Take. And during the episode, he addressed the viral Inside the NBA confrontation. And in true Barkley fashion, he said that it wasn’t really anything he was concerned about because he and Green went for drinks at a dive bar after the show while NBA Twitter was on fire. “What was interesting about it, I didn’t even pay it that much of attention,” Barkley said. “So we g

item.title: Fan: “We miss you on the Warriors.” Klay Thompson: …
item.description: Legion Hoops: Fan: “We miss you on the Warriors.” Klay Thompson: “Never say never.” (via la_tinapr / TikTok)

item.title: Las Vegas Summer League honors Brandon Clarke with a …
item.description: Ben Golliver: Las Vegas Summer League honors Brandon Clarke with a moment of silence before Sunday’s championship game between the Memphis Grizzlies and Golden State Warriors. Clarke led the Grizzlies to the 2019 Las Vegas Summer League championship and was named MVP.

item.title: Cameron Boozer has been one of the stars of Summer …
item.description: Bobby Krivitsky: Cameron Boozer has been one of the stars of Summer League this year. He now has a chance to cap his impressive showing with a championship win. Boozer and Cedric Coward make this Grizzlies team the betting favorite in this matchup against the Warriors.

item.title: Yaxel Lendeborg leads Warriors to NBA Summer League title vs. Grizzlies
item.description: Yaxel Lendeborg won his second ring in four months Sunday, leading the Golden State Warriors past the Memphis Grizzlies 94-90 in the NBA summer league championship game at UNLV's Thomas & Mack Center. Lendeborg, who starred for the University of Michigan's NCAA title team last season, finished with 21 points and 10 rebounds to outduel Cameron Boozer in an intense showdown of 2026 lottery picks. He became just the second player to win a Division I NCAA championship and a Vegas summer league title

item.title: When you’re in a role that I’m in, you open yourself …
item.description: NBA Courtside: Grant Hill on Jaylen Brown not being on the USA team: “When I announced then team, there were certain guys that I called before Woj and Shams broke it. And I called like Lillard, I called Jimmy Butler, I tried to call everybody because you never know when they’re going to break it. And you want to give guys the respect to hear it from me. I called Jaylen. We had a great conversation. Unbelievable conversation. And so something got lost there. And the implication that like a shoe c

item.title: Brian Windhorst on LeBron James: I think Miami is on …
item.description: Brian Windhorst on LeBron James: I think Miami is on the board. Absolutely. I think it's for sure he's looking at that. And I think Stephen, you laid it out great. The narrative, the arc, the good story, which LeBron cares about story. Call it PR, call it whatever you want. LeBron cares about story. The story is in Cleveland. The family is in Golden State. And that's USA basketball, too. He played with with Steph Curry, USA basketball. That's that connection is there, too. The basketball is in M

item.title: Kings announce two preseason games against the Lakers:
item.description: Khobi Price: Kings announce two preseason games against the Lakers: Oct. 5 in Sacramento Oct. 8 in Los Angeles Warriors are scheduled to host the Lakers on Oct. 6, meaning LAL will have a preseason back-to-back in Sacramento and San Francisco. Three games in four nights for the Lakers.

item.title: Klay Thompson on return to Warriors: 'I got one year on my deal, it'd be nice to end it in Golden State'
item.description: Legion Hoops: Fan: “Are you going to go back to the Warriors?” Klay Thompson: “Shoot I don't know. I got one year on my deal. It'd be nice to end it in Golden State.” (via @EinhornGabe)

item.title: Thompson gave an honest reply that's got rumor mills …
item.description: So when a fan met Klay Thompson for an autograph signing event, the guy could only speak his mind and ask whether the 36-year-old wanted to return to the Warriors. "Are you going to go back to the Warriors anytime?" a fan asked Thompson. Thompson gave an honest reply that's got rumor mills buzzing. "Shoot I don't know," Thompson said. "I got one year on my deal. It'd be nice to end it in Golden State.”

item.title: Tucker says LeBron James is going to Golden State: “I …
item.description: NBA Courtside: PJ Tucker says LeBron James is going to Golden State: “I like Bron in Golden State it’s going to be tough. Oh my god. AD about to get out of Washington. They going to get AD. AD and Bron to Golden State. What’s up.” (Via @club520podcast)
